name: Nix Package Manager
description: Installs the Nix package manager with flakes support and optional home-manager integration for reproducible dev environments

multiUser.description: Install Nix in multi-user mode (recommended for containers)

flakes.description: Enable Nix flakes and the new nix command

homeManager.description: Install home-manager for user-level package and dotfile management

packages.description: Space-separated list of Nix packages to install after setup (e.g., 'git vim htop')
